_comment: Bootstrap model registry. Each architecture lists files to download into /workspace/models/<dest>/<filename>. The bootstrap script (scripts/bootstrap-models.sh) skips files that already exist with non-zero size, and resumes partial downloads.

_format.name: filename on disk (must match the model loader's expectations)
_format.url: direct download URL (HuggingFace 'resolve/main/...' or any HTTPS URL)
_format.size_mb: expected size in MB — informational, used for progress display only
_format.auth: optional: 'hf' to send the HF_TOKEN env var as a bearer header

z-image.description: Z-Image Turbo (bf16) + AE VAE + Qwen3 4B text encoder — from Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo

z-image-nvfp4.description: Z-Image Turbo (NVFP4 quantized, ~4.5GB) + AE VAE + Qwen3 4B FP8 mixed encoder — REQUIRES Blackwell GPU (RTX 5090, GB10x). On Ampere/Ada NVFP4 dequantizes to fp16 at load and OOMs. Use z-image-gguf instead on those cards.

z-image-gguf.description: Z-Image Turbo BF16 GGUF + AE VAE + Qwen3 4B FP16 GGUF encoder — full precision (no quantization), GGUF container for sd.cpp streaming/offload friendliness. ~20.7GB total weights; needs offload_to_cpu or layer streaming on 16-20GB cards.
